privileged_info_summary: The task 'enable_product_reviews@1' involves configuring a Drupal Commerce product review system on the 'Urban Electronics' store. The target product is 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' with SKU 'SONY-WH1000XM5', seeded from seed_products.php. The task requires creating a Comment Type with machine name 'product_review' and label 'Product Review', adding a comment field 'field_reviews' to the Default Product type, and posting a test review with subject 'Amazing Quality' and body 'Best headphones I've ever owned.' All metadata values are verified against the task description, seed data script (seed_products.php), export script (export_result.sh), and verifier logic (verifier.py).
